title: AUDIT-RUN output — lens-based audit findings + summary

lenses.description: input lenses array preserved verbatim from .audit/lenses.json for traceability

name.description: lens name as supplied by Operator

description.description: lens description as supplied by Operator

id.description: criterion id; LC1, LC2, … globally across all lenses

test.description: criterion test description as supplied by Operator

scope.description: input scope object preserved verbatim from .audit/scope.json

default_used.description: true if Operator did not supply scope and default ** was used

findings.description: findings where a criterion failed; empty array means all criteria passed for all in-scope files

lens_id.description: lens id this finding belongs to

file.description: path to the file where criterion failed, relative to project root

line.description: line number of the finding when a single line is identified; omit when not applicable

finding.description: what was observed in the file that caused the criterion to fail

remediation.description: what to do to address the finding

pass_count.description: count of (file, criterion) pairs with no finding — total assessments minus total findings
